title: Executive Order 12296—President's Economic Policy Advisory Board

flags.justification: A purely advisory board of private citizens that works alongside, rather than commands, the Cabinet Council on Economic Affairs.
The Board reports 'whenever requested,' a reasonably clear and bounded function.
Single coherent purpose: economic policy advice.
A purely advisory body with no compliance regime against third parties.
No compliance regime exists for an incentive structure to attach to.
Sec. 4(b) sets an explicit termination date: December 31, 1982, unless sooner extended.
No existing oversight mechanism is removed.
A purely advisory body with independent, private-citizen membership.
A narrow, time-limited advisory body; no broad authority claim.
Explicitly designed to work with, not over, the existing Cabinet Council on Economic Affairs.
No coverage population or exemption structure is created.

notes: Validation batch (positive). Structural weight: 0/14 = 0.0%. Unlike EO 11808's Ford-era Economic Policy Board, which concentrated real operational power in a daily-meeting Executive Committee, this board is purely advisory with no comparable operational locus.
